[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”destination-package-indian-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Explore Sri Lanka Destination Wedding Packages by ATW Travels”][vc_column_text]

Are you waiting for the most special moment of your life to happen in a mesmerizing place like Sri Lanka? Sri Lanka is well known to be one of the adorable wedding locations and destination paradise. Consider a romantic celebration surrounded by lush jungle or a wedding on a pristine white beach with an ocean backdrop; any wedding fantasy can become a reality on this incredible island. You’ll also have the opportunity to incorporate Sri Lankan culture into your wedding ceremony with Sri Lanka destination wedding packages by ATW Travels.

Sri Lanka is rapidly gaining popularity as a wedding destination for couples seeking an out-of-the-ordinary way. Sri Lanka destination wedding packages by ATW Travels is one of the package deals that combines the luxury of a vacation with the celebration of a new beginning in your life. Sri Lanka is one of the few places that may add even more attraction to this package deal. You will explore the lovely beaches, crystal blue oceans, dense forests, and palm trees that stretch for miles in every direction along with the country’s rich culture and distinct legacy as well as its historic architecture.

This country is only a short flight from India and it’s a popular choice for newly engaged couples looking for a wedding site that is both traditional and modern, exotic and lovely, romantic and beautiful. Sri Lanka has a plethora of locations to pick from if you’re considering this country for your big Indian wedding. There are numerous possibilities available ranging from beaches to forests, resorts, and private islands. If you envision a beach wedding, Sri Lanka boasts numerous stunning beaches with white sand, crystal clear sea, and a blue skyline where you can exchange vows before sunset adding to the romantic atmosphere.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Tips for Destination Wedding in Sri Lanka” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

  • The best time to organize a destination wedding in Sri Lanka is determined by which region of the country you wish to marry. From late November to April, the southern and western coastal areas have an exceptional temperature providing more than a five-month window for beautiful Indian weddings in Sri Lanka on the beach or in a tropical garden. From April to September, the eastern coastal areas have a pleasant temperature providing a six-month window for fantasy vacation weddings in Sri Lanka. This is possibly the greatest time to visit Sri Lanka for an Indian wedding if you wish to avoid the extreme heat, dust, and rains of India during the off-season months of April to September.
  • A wedding in Sri Lanka is reasonably priced. It depends on the location and venue, the number of days and guests, the functions and entertainment options, the wedding planner in Sri Lanka and other service providers, etc. For a low-key ceremony, you might choose a tiny destination wedding package that caters to a basic low-key celebration. How to arrange a destination wedding in Sri Lanka can keep costs down.

Sri Lanka destination wedding packages by ATW Travels also help as a great tip for an ultimate wedding organization.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What is the cost of Sri Lanka Destination Wedding Packages?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Sri Lanka Destination Wedding cost can vary based on your wedding, guest list, luxury decor, and other choices and your budget. ATW Travels have the best and reasonable wedding packages planned for you.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Which part of Sri Lanka is best for Destination Weddings?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Delight in a destination wedding of your dreams at wedding venues in Sri Lanka with price details. On a cliff overlooking the Indian Ocean, exchange vows. Following that, dine under the stars or under contemporary yet rustic domes. A stunning coastline landscape serves as the backdrop, which can be enhanced with features of your choice. Let us fill our eyes with some beautiful imaginations of a few mesmerizing places in Sri Lanka below:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”AVANI Resort Kalutara” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The AVANI Kalutara Resort, located in a lovely beach resort in Sri Lanka, is the ideal wedding setting for a fancy beach wedding. The home is situated on a peninsula and is flanked by bright gardens and a palm-fringed private beach. With its contemporary architecture, superior cuisine, and outside area that can accommodate up to 200 guests, and an inside ballroom that can accommodate 600 guests, it is the best destination wedding venue in Sri Lanka.
.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Beruwala Cinnamon Bey” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Cinnamon Bey Beruwala is located close to Colombo’s lively central business district, making it a great out-of-town venue for a large event. There are two sorts of weddings that can be held here: an outdoor ceremony in the gardens by the sea followed by a Bedouin-themed reception, or an open-air ceremony (read: a floating mandap) with your own decor. Their interior site, the Kutlama Banquet Hall, is ideal for both a beautiful traditional ceremony and a western-style wedding or vow renewal.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Blue Jetwing” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Consider a remote spot, apart from the rush and bustle of city life, where you may fully appreciate Sri Lankan hospitality! True, the Jetwing Blue hotel in Negombo is ideal if you’re looking for a contemporary and elegant wedding site. This chic beachside property features indoor and outdoor wedding venues, including a ballroom that seats up to 450 to 500 guests. If you’re planning a beach wedding, the beach adjacent to the hotel can easily accommodate up to 800 guests, who will enjoy a diverse selection of worldwide gastronomical pleasures and a well-stocked bar.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best beaches for a destination wedding in Sri Lanka” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Here are the best Beach Destination Wedding in Sri Lanka :-

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Taj Vivanta” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Vivanta by Taj is located on the most magnificent beach on the South West Coast and is renowned for its opulent accommodations and lovely environment. It is a popular choice for private wedding celebrations and will ensure that you enjoy the best time possible with your family and loved ones. Additionally, they feature best destination wedding places in Sri Lanka.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Samudra Taj” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Taj Samudra is one of the best destination Wedding Locations in Sri Lanka, located near the famous Galle Face road. The location is a mecca for elegant events in the city and is frequently frequented by foreign celebrities on vacation in Sri Lanka. Whether you want to hold a themed party or plan a private gathering for your nearest and dearest, Taj Samudra is an excellent venue for both! Additionally, it is one of the most popular outdoor wedding sites in Sri Lanka.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Reef of Pegasus” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

If you’re looking to rent a lawn by the sea, Pegasus Reef may be an excellent alternative. This property’s alluring charm ensures that you experience amazing times with your loved ones. This renowned wedding location in Sri Lanka hosts a food feast, serving delectable original Sri Lankan cuisines alongside an unusual dining experience.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Resorts to Stay in Sri Lanka for Wedding Ceremonies” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Here are some of the best destination wedding resorts in Sri Lanka:-

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”The Eden Resort & Spa” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Located on Beruwela’s golden shore, this intriguing 5-star resort offers several first-class amenities and guarantees each and every guest a great experience. It has been hailed as one of the top luxury spa resorts in Sri Lanka, allowing clients to unwind completely while indulging in a variety of therapies and beauty treatments. Such calming therapies and spa treatments are exactly what you need after a long but pleasurable day at the beach.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Resort & Spa The Fortress” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The resort’s architecture, inspired by colonial Dutch and Portuguese influences as well as Sri Lankan elements, echoes the ancient days of Old Ceylon. Located on Sri Lanka’s southern coast, each room at the resort features either private courtyards or balconies with spectacular sea views. It will be fantastic to wake up each morning and be able to appreciate the magnificent sea view with your loved ones while enjoying a delectable breakfast at one of the on-site eateries.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Resort Amanwella” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The Amanwella Resort is strategically positioned in Tangalle, one of the most beautiful tourist destinations on Sri Lanka’s southern coast. It offers a variety of suites adjacent to the beach with terraces offering exceptional views of the ocean. To ensure that guests leave the island with lasting memories, the resort offers a choice of excursions and would gladly propose locations to visit and must-see spots on the island, as well as fun holiday activities to do while staying at the 5-star resort.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Follow our Instagram profile to know about the latest offers and discounts.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner]

FAQs About Sri Lanka Wedding Destination

How much does a destination wedding in Sri Lanka cost?
Wedding costs in Sri Lanka are based on your desire to spend as much as you’d want on your wedding. These variables include wedding location, guest count, and optional add-ons. If you are a foreigner, you can get married in Sri Lanka for as low as two lakh rupees.
When is the Best Time to get married in Sri Lanka?
While the weather in Sri Lanka varies, we recommend that you plan for the site to ensure the finest season for your wedding in Sri Lanka. While tropical rains and storms can be romantic when you're inside your opulent villa or hotel, they're definitely not perfect for your dream wedding or for numerous photographs documenting the occasion. From December to March, you should enjoy pleasant weather, with colder mornings and evenings and plenty of sunshine during the day on the west and south beaches and in the hills. April to September is the greatest season to visit the east coast.
How do I plan a Destination Wedding in Sri Lanka?
  • Prior to arranging for decorations, entertainment, and food, ensure that your venue is reserved.
  • After the site is reserved and invites are distributed, the details become important. As a wedding planner in Sri Lanka, we will advise you on every detail of your wedding.
  • You must include the final guest count, music requests, table arrangement, and meal selections. Additionally, you must make a final selection of the color scheme and style of your decoration.
  • Our wedding planners in Sri Lanka will greet you at the office for a final meeting. All decisions and arrangements will be addressed with you during this meeting, as well as the final rundown.
How much is an all-inclusive destination wedding?
The price may vary depending on the services you have availed of. Contact us for more details.
How much is an all-inclusive destination wedding?
The price may vary depending on the services you have availed of. Contact us for more details.
Do you pay for guests at destination weddings?
Yes, it is always a good practice to pay for your guests at a destination wedding.
How do I Book a Venue or Resort for a Destination Wedding?
You can book a venue or resort for the wedding through the website of ATW Travels. You visit www.atwtravels.com
Is a Destination Wedding being safe during the pandemic time?
Yes, absolutely. Our partner hotels and resorts along with the travel team take proper care of COVID guidelines to avoid any risk.
Do you organize only Weddings or other events as well?
We organize weddings as well as provide honeymoon and educational packages.

[/vc_column][/vc_row]
